message:
feat(tests): add 32-test proptest suite for session_profiles (ft-3681t.2.4)

Property-based and unit tests covering: serde roundtrips for all session
profile types (ProfileRole, FleetStartupStrategy, ResourceHints,
ProfilePolicy, SpawnCommand, AgentIdentitySpec, SessionProfile,
FleetProgramTarget, FleetLaunchPlan), ProfileRegistry register/resolve
properties, persona environment merging, fleet resolve with
deterministic ordering and launch plan invariant validation, program
mix delta tracking, and validation error detection (empty names,
orphan personas, empty fleets, duplicate slot labels, empty
bootstrap commands).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
